characterSwaps.pageTitle: Frank, Julie, Susie, Joey/Robbie The Rabbit
characterSwaps.name: Robbie The Rabbit
characterSwaps.sourcePage: Frank, Julie, Susie, Joey/Robbie The Rabbit

fullSets.name: Undercover Espionage
fullSets.description: Her work made her the target of many individuals and corporations, so she had to make herself anonymous.

fullSets.name: Moving On
fullSets.description: A brand-new place for a brand-new chapter. After destroying the cult that forced her into hiding, Cheryl could express herself and become the person she wanted to be.

fullSets.name: Starting Over
fullSets.description: A brand-new place for a brand-new chapter. After destroying the cult that forced her into hiding, Cheryl could express herself and become the person she wanted to be.

fullSets.name: Alessa Gillespie
fullSets.description: She felt a hollow inside, a sadness filled her soul. Her grief reminded her of Alessa Gillespie in her school uniform.

fullSets.name: James Sunderland
fullSets.description: A widower of three years, James Sunderland's life changed when he received a strange letter from his dead wife.

fullSets.name: Cybil Bennett
fullSets.description: A courageous officer who journeyed through the streets of Silent Hill in an attempt to find a lost little girl.

fullSets.name: Lisa Garland
fullSets.description: At night she'd wake up in sweat with waves of dread washing over her body. Faint memories of monstrous figures hobbling through the hospital. And she was one of them.

fullSets.name: Eren's Uniform
fullSets.description: The outfit of a skilled fighter from a lost realm.

fullSets.name: Bearer of Gifts
fullSets.description: She attended a high-end event of an art gallery to meet an important dealer of rare jewels.

fullSets.name: Reindeer Onesie
fullSets.description: She did her best to combat the loneliness of the holidays, and her onesie was an essential part of that effort.

fullSets.name: Armin's Uniform
fullSets.description: The outfit of an intelligent officer from a lost realm.

fullSets.name: Suiting Architect
fullSets.description: He attended a classy event in the hopes of finding an investor for his ambitious architectural project that lacked funding.

fullSets.name: S.T.A.R.S. Uniform
fullSets.description: He found himself dressed as some sort of agent or soldier.

fullSets.name: Beauty Sleep Pyjamas
fullSets.description: During the holiday break, Feng Min spent the time away from streams, focusing her time on self-care and catching up on her favorite television series.

fullSets.name: Little Red Gaming Fit
fullSets.description: Staying anonymous isn't easy when you're a legendary player. In this big red hood, Feng Min could enter any internet café and test her skills.

fullSets.name: Jill Cosplay
fullSets.description: For each convention she went to, she liked to have a new costume on deck.

fullSets.name: Overlap Diver
fullSets.description: er research into the Ravage took her to an offshore shipwreck.

fullSets.name: Levi's Uniform
fullSets.description: The outfit of an aloof leader from a lost realm.

fullSets.name: The Goddess Muse
fullSets.description: Through poetry and tales of Thalia, an outfit formed of the fog.

fullSets.name: S.T.A.R.S. Uniform
fullSets.description: The uniform she wore during her mission in the Arklay Mountains.

fullSets.name: Sheva Alomar
fullSets.description: A member of BSAA on a mission to apprehend a black-market seller of Bio-Organic Weapons.

fullSets.name: Claire Redfield
fullSets.description: After weeks of not hearing from her big brother, she left college to seek him out.

fullSets.name: Impervious Agent
fullSets.description: Brave and tenacious, she overcame the Raccoon City Destruction Incident and returned to save more lives.

fullSets.name: Historia's Uniform
fullSets.description: The outfit of a mysterious claimant from a lost realm.

fullSets.name: Lyrical Goddess
fullSets.description: At first light, a little songbird landed on her windowsill and awoke her with music. She spent the rest of the day composing divine melodies.

fullSets.name: Lady Volksfest
fullSets.description: Kate never missed a chance to sing at a festival, and she was prepared for Oktoberfest to be a raucous one.

fullSets.name: Carlos Oliveira
fullSets.description: An Umbrella mercenary with a troubled past.

fullSets.name: Detective Noir
fullSets.description: An outfit that looks like it came right out of a 1940s mystery novel.

fullSets.name: Chris Redfield
fullSets.description: Previously a gifted pilot in the Air Force, Chris Redfield joined the S.T.A.R.S.'s Alpha Team as a point man and found new challenges to overcome.

fullSets.name: Persistent Investigator
fullSets.description: Hellbent on finding those responsible for the destruction of Raccoon City, he put his life on the line to find Umbrella Corporation’s Headquarters.

fullSets.name: Annie's Uniform
fullSets.description: The outfit of a duplicitous agent from a lost realm.

fullSets.name: Graff-Crafter
fullSets.description: She hit the streets with her art to escape the mundane life she'd been forced to live miles away from her home country.

fullSets.name: Stockholm Art Fest
fullSets.description: A bold look for a bold scene. Nea entered the Stockholm urban art festival to prove to herself that she's a unique, gifted street artist.

fullSets.name: Futuristic Glider
fullSets.description: A bold look for a bold scene. Nea entered the Stockholm urban art festival to prove to herself that she's a unique, gifted street artist.

fullSets.name: Cowgirl Outfit
fullSets.description: An outfit that evokes memories of frontier medicine.

fullSets.name: Jonathan Byers
fullSets.description: As Nancy & Jonathan attempt to expose the Hawkins Lab's secret operations, they must admit first what deteriorated their relationship and how to fix it.

fullSets.name: Mikasa's Uniform
fullSets.description: The outfit of a determined warrior from a lost realm.

fullSets.name: Seoul Socialite
fullSets.description: Attends the most elite parties of socialite at the heart of the city, not far from her freshly obtained penthouse residence.

fullSets.name: Hange's Uniform
fullSets.description: The outfit of a curious innovator from a lost realm.

fullSets.name: Penguin Onesie
fullSets.description: A gift from Zarina’s mother that still brought a smile to her face after many years. It kept her warm when the heating gave out in their Manhattan apartment.
